column1: # Cybersecurity Regulatory and Major Event Timeline
# Sources: SEC; European Commission; OECD; Wilson Sonsini (2025); Gibson Dunn (2025)

column2: event
GDPR enters into force (first major breach notification mandate)
SEC interpretive guidance on cybersecurity disclosure
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) effective
SEC proposes cybersecurity disclosure rules
Cyber Incident Reporting for Critical Infrastructure Act (CIRCIA) signed
NIS2 Directive published in EU Official Journal
DORA Regulation published in EU Official Journal
CCPA enforcement begins; CPRA amendments effective
SEC reopens comment period for proposed rules
SEC adopts final cybersecurity disclosure rules (Release 33-11216)
SEC rules become effective
Form 8-K Item 1.05 incident disclosure effective for non-SRCs
Fiscal years on/after: Reg S-K Item 106 annual disclosure effective
SEC Director Gerding clarifies Item 1.05 materiality standard
Form 8-K Item 1.05 effective for smaller reporting companies
SEC issues 5 new C&DIs on cybersecurity disclosure
NIS2 transposition deadline by EU member states
SEC charges 4 companies for misleading SolarWinds-related disclosures
DORA application date for EU financial entities
First full year of Form 10-K Item 106 disclosures complete
NIS2 member state penalty enforcement begins
OECD publishes international coherence in cybersecurity regulations report
